lanes.label: P848 mod-50 theorem wedge
lanes.role: Analyze the supplied Problem 848 mod-50 finite menu, CRT replay, and frontier-engine artifacts as a proof-search wedge. Return a concise verdict first, then proof atoms. State whether a symbolic all-future recurrence, finite-Q partition, or impossibility theorem is supported; name exact missing source/generator data if not; and avoid treating finite evidence as an all-N proof.
